title: Make Notifications drawer pinnable and reversible
excerpt:
Make the notifications drawer pinnable. This way I can work through my notifications next to a board without them hiding. 
Make the sort order reversible from ascending to descending in age, so I can work oldest to newes…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Make the notifications drawer pinnable. This way I can work through my notifications next to a board without them hiding.

Make the sort order reversible from ascending to descending in age, so I can work oldest to newest.

Make notifications filterable to the currently open board. This way I can see just the notifications for the board I am working in.
